name: Thalys Medical Technology Group Inc.
summary: Thalys Medical Technology Group Inc. engages in the medical intensive business and operation services in China. The company was formerly known as Thalys Medical Technology Inc. and changed its name to Thalys Medical Technology Group Inc. in September 2020. Thalys Medical Technology Group Inc. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Wuhan, China.
